can_do: Create short tactical advantages: smoke, fire control, gate weakening, bridge stress, horse panic, signal bursts, temporary shielding.
limits: Short duration, preparation, exhaustion and collateral risk.

can_do: Stop bleeding, slow infection, stabilize nobles, commanders and skilled soldiers.
limits: Cannot mass-heal armies or resurrect the dead.

can_do: Detect tunnels, weaken mortar, harden timber, spoil fires, support engineers or breach gates at high cost.
limits: Requires time, engineers, catalysts and protection.

can_do: Pattern reading, truth pressure, dream interpretation, signal detection, imperfect divination and counter-spy ritual.
Oath-binding, witness rituals, legitimacy ceremonies, treaty seals and succession rites.
limits: Only matters if people believe the ritual is valid.

can_do: Improve alloys, preserve food, treat shipwood, fireproof materials, surgical tools, lenses and rare engineering work.
limits: Specialist labour, catalysts and institutional control.
